creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
sysctls from loader.conf and sysctl.conf in case that helps:

hw.kbd.keymap_restrict_change=4
kern.elf32.allow_wx=0
kern.elf32.aslr.enable=1
kern.elf32.aslr.honor_sbrk=0
kern.elf32.aslr.pie_enable=1
kern.elf64.allow_wx=0
kern.elf64.allow_wx=1
kern.elf64.aslr.enable=1
kern.elf64.aslr.honor_sbrk=0
kern.elf64.aslr.pie_enable=1
kern.geom.label.disk_ident.enable=0
kern.geom.label.gpt.enable=1
kern.geom.label.gptid.enable=0
kern.msgbuf_show_timestamp=1
kern.randompid=1
net.inet.icmp.drop_redirect=1
net.inet.ip.check_interface=1
net.inet.ip.process_options=0
net.inet.ip.random_id=1
net.inet.ip.redirect=0
net.inet.tcp.always_keepalive=0
net.inet.tcp.blackhole=2
net.inet.tcp.drop_synfin=1
net.inet.tcp.ecn.enable=0
net.inet.tcp.fast_finwait2_recycle=1
net.inet.tcp.finwait2_timeout=5000
net.inet.tcp.icmp_may_rst=0
net.inet.tcp.keepinit=5000
net.inet.tcp.minmss=536
net.inet.tcp.msl=2500
net.inet.tcp.mssdflt=1460
net.inet.tcp.nolocaltimewait=1
net.inet.tcp.path_mtu_discovery=0
net.inet.tcp.rexmit_slop=70
net.inet.tcp.sack.enable=0
net.inet.udp.blackhole=1
security.bsd.allow_destructive_dtrace=0
security.bsd.hardlink_check_gid=0
security.bsd.hardlink_check_gid=1
security.bsd.hardlink_check_uid=0
security.bsd.hardlink_check_uid=1
security.bsd.see_jail_proc=0
security.bsd.see_other_gids=0
security.bsd.see_other_uids=0
security.bsd.stack_guard_page=1
security.bsd.unprivileged_proc_debug=0
security.bsd.unprivileged_read_msgbuf=0
vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift=12
